name: Drudge

abilities.name: Dependable
abilities.text: Enemy models within 3" may not declare the Interact action.

abilities.name: Put Your Back Into It
abilities.text: Once per turn. Before this model moves, it may discard a card to remove a marker within 2" of it. If it does, after resolving the move, make a marker of the same type into base contact with this model.

actions.name: Target a Scheme marker
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within 4" of the target. Then if the target was friendly, remove the target. If the target was enemy and this action received a raise, remove the target.

triggers.name: Glory of Ridley
triggers.text: Draw a card of value 1-3 from your discard pile.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Peon (3)' characteristic
